<!-- Custom instructions for LocalChatbot project -->

## Project Overview
LocalChatbot is a Python-based chatbot that reads and analyzes files on the local system, providing information about file locations, file contents, and folder structures.

## Key Features
- Read and analyze local files
- Display file/folder information
- Provide file content summaries
- Interactive command-line interface

## Development Guidelines
- Use Python 3.8+ for development
- Follow PEP 8 coding standards
- Include error handling for file operations
- Maintain modular code structure
